summary: Tested Department CMS and Batch Management features for Prashnakosh. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified via Playwright - all required elements present and functional.

minor.issue: Creating teacher without wingId returns 400 'Wing is required for teachers' - this is expected behavior but should be documented

issues: One department card shows UUID as class name (d29e88a1-05b4-4aca-9ed1-5edd868ada93) - appears to be orphaned test data from previous testing

action_items: Clean up orphaned test data (class with UUID name) from database
Consider adding data-testid to department card subject names for easier testing
critical_code_review_comments: Department CMS correctly implements Class × Subject = Department model
Backward compatibility for /api/chapters and /api/lessons works correctly
Super admin can create users with rollNumber field
HOD can view departments via GET /api/admin/departments
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with: 1 school (MVMCHN), 4 classes (IX-XII), 7 subjects, 28 departments auto-generated, 1 HOD (Dr. Ram Kumar assigned as head of IX_Science), 1 teacher (Priya Singh assigned to IX_Science and X_Science)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Department CMS feature is fully functional. Backend APIs for classes, subjects, departments, and batches all work correctly. Frontend /admin/departments page loads with all required elements. The 'chapter' field has been renamed to 'lesson' in the schema, and both /api/chapters and /api/lessons endpoints work (backward compat). PostgreSQL database is running with all tables created via drizzle-kit push.
verified_features: GET /api/admin/classes - returns 4 classes (IX, X, XI, XII)
POST /api/admin/departments/generate - generates departments from class × subject combinations
POST /api/superadmin/users with rollNumber - creates student with roll number
HOD can view departments via GET /api/admin/departments

frontend_verification.login_page: Renders correctly with school code, email, password fields
frontend_verification.admin_dashboard: Shows School Admin welcome message with school selector

departments_tab.department_cards: 29 department cards displayed grouped by class
departments_tab.head_assignment: IX_Science shows HOD: Dr. Ram Kumar

subjects_tab.table: Shows Science, Mathematics, English, Hindi, Sanskrit, Social Science, Computer Science with codes
